examples: The title of one of Dietrich's best-known songs could serve as the leitmotif for her life.
The leitmotif of the disaster is cars.
Maybe greater inequality in pay is an unavoidable megatrend, a leitmotif for the 21st century.
Amid the drums of war Iran, too, has been sounding a quieter leitmotif of compromise.
The giant sucking sound emanating from the South and West, another leitmotif of American demographics, continues unmuffled.
